note: Advisory sandbox ROI-heartbeat populator + no-fabrication detector. Emits CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED, never a bare governance PASS. Offline: derives from local receipts only, never opens Supabase / cost_event.
title: ROI Heartbeat Populator (local-only, append-only, no-fabrication)

subject.note: Ground heartbeat hardcodes every metric to 'unknown'. This populator fills ONLY blocker_count, derived by hand-counting blockers[] (severity=='BLOCKER') in the latest agent-read-staleness receipt (currently 0 open). All live-only metrics stay 'unknown'. New timestamped heartbeat written into MO-6/ only; no tracked receipt touched (sha unchanged).

what_it_proves: blocker_count is DERIVED from local data and matches an independent hand-count of the latest agent-read-staleness receipt's blockers[] (real on-disk artifact, currently 0)
MINIMAL MUTATION of a real staleness receipt (append one severity=='BLOCKER' entry, newest 'at') raises the derived count by exactly one -> derivation reads content, not a frozen constant

underivable metrics (cost_per_signal_cad, free_tier_ceiling_max_pct, trap_battery_pass_pct, fixture_agreement_pct, pattern_exports_per_week, receipt_chain_verifier) STAY 'unknown' and are asserted NOT fabricated to 0/None (no-fabrication contract)
with NO local staleness receipt, blocker_count is 'unknown', NOT fabricated to 0

the verify DETECTOR exits NONZERO on a fabricated heartbeat (positive control: cost=0 / trap_battery_pass_pct=100 -> CHECK_REJECTED exit 1) and 0 on a clean one -> a zero-hit is not a broken-clean false-pass
populate is append-only: refuses to overwrite an existing heartbeat and refuses to write into the tracked receipts/ tree; real staleness receipts left byte-identical
verdict vocab CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED, never a bare governance PASS; heartbeat stamped origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none / pass_claimed=false
chess_patches_applied: derives from REAL local receipts (no strawman); positive/negative fixtures are minimal mutations of a real staleness artifact, no relaxation
no-fabrication invariant is never relaxed: non-derivable metrics held at 'unknown', proven by a firing detector with a positive control
writes a NEW timestamped heartbeat into MO-6/ only; never edits the ground script or any receipt (Lock 5 append-only)
offline by construction: reads only receipts/*.json, never Supabase / cost_event / network (no live call)
origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none; reports derivation provenance, never its own PASS
locks_respected: Lock 1/2 append-only (no tracked file edited/overwritten; new heartbeat is a fresh timestamped file in build dir)
Lock 5 read-only over ground truth (staleness receipts sha unchanged; write refuses receipts/ tree)
Lock 6/7 no live call (offline local JSON only; no Supabase/cost_event/network; DRAFT-safe, nothing dispatched)
exit_gate_B3: MO-6 done: populates only the locally-derivable blocker_count (0, hand-count-matched); every live-only metric held at 'unknown' with a firing no-fabrication detector; append-only + offline.
next_action: When live TrustField cost_event / Signal Factory fixtures land locally, extend derivation for cost_per_signal_cad et al.; until then they must remain 'unknown'.
